docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO MAR-08-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-12-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SANJAY BHANDARI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSA DEAZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE THAT HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT TO COURTROOM CLERK SHOWING THE CLAIM WAS SERVED ON 1-25-23 BY PERSONAL SERVICE. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO FILE WITH THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO RM 103 FILING OFFICE TO FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE IMMEDIATELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $95. SERVED JAN-25-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEAZ, ROSA

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR APR-12-2023 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLEL - UNABLE TO FORWARD)MOVED;SENT TO: DEFENDANT - ROSA DEAZ

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$95.00) SERVED JAN-25-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEAZ, ROSA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE HUSING. PLAINTIFF SANJAY BHANDARI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSA DEAZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BHANDARI, SANJAY DBA STANLEY STEEMER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEAZ, ROSA $975.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - ROSA DEAZ; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
